name: Exit Liquidity Siren
description: Alerts when a watched position starts showing liquidity drops, sell pressure, whale exits, volume collapse, or drawdown triggers.
degenPitch: The siren for when the party starts smelling like exit liquidity.
whatItDoes: Monitors liquidity drops, sell pressure spikes, whale exits, and drawdowns.
Emits user-confirmed exit intents or paid alerts.
Never executes exits from the backend.
cursorPrompt: Build an Exit Liquidity Siren using DNA x402. Watch liquidity drops, sell pressure, whale exits, volume collapse, and drawdown thresholds. Return signal-only or user-confirmed exit intents and require receipt verification for premium alerts.
suggestedPrompt: Build an Exit Liquidity Siren using DNA x402. Watch liquidity drops, sell pressure, whale exits, volume collapse, and drawdown thresholds. Return signal-only or user-confirmed exit intents and require receipt verification for premium alerts.
